title: Resize File Preview Window vs. Full Screen
excerpt: The file preview shouldn’t cover the entire board. I often need to reference information from a document that has been uploaded to the board. When I click on the file, it opens into a window that consumes the entire scre…

posts.author: tfVu8 (Your full name)
posts.cookedHtml: The file preview shouldn’t cover the entire board. I often need to reference information from a document that has been uploaded to the board. When I click on the file, it opens into a window that consumes the entire screen, which means I can’t edit items related to the file while looking at the file; instead, I must close the file viewer and go back to the board item, which is very tedious.
